headline: Autonomous agent tooling broke out as NotebookLM and Hermes updates turned assistants into self-directed builders.
body: Agentic tooling dominates the day, with two NotebookLM and Hermes updates reframing assistants as autonomous builders: NotebookLM now writes code, builds sources, and produces finished outputs on a cloud computer, while Hermes adds a Blank Slate mode for assembling agents from minimal components [1][3]. SEO automation surfaces alongside, as a Claude Code system wires Google Search Console data into automatic content generation and deployment across sites [5]. Local multi-agent execution also advances, with Gemma running 10 parallel subagents under a single orchestrator above 170 tokens per second on one machine [4]. A full CS50 introductory AI sequence entered the window, driving the educational-curriculum breakout [6][7][8][9][11].
